content.problemStatement:
Nice work on building your first project using C. We have curated many more projects for you to build.

Note that this is a beta course and we would love to hear any feedback on how we can improve this project, content or anything else.

Please use the star button on the right hand side to provide feedback.

And then, let's build a few more (and bigger) projects.
content.outputFormat:
Print exactly the following text (including line breaks):
Nice work on building your first project using C. We have curated many more projects for you to build.

Note that this is a beta course and we would love to hear any feedback on how we can improve this project, content or anything else.

Please use the star button on the right hand side to provide feedback.

And then, let's build a few more (and bigger) projects.

solution.approach: The problem requires printing a fixed multi‑line message. No computation or input processing is needed. The solution simply outputs the given text exactly as specified, ensuring that line breaks and punctuation match the statement.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few constant‑size strings.

code.Python3:
import sys
msg = "Nice work on building your first project using C. We have curated many more projects for you to build.

Note that this is a beta course and we would love to hear any feedback on how we can improve this project, content or anything else.

Please use the star button on the right hand side to provide feedback.

And then, let's build a few more (and bigger) projects."
sys.stdout.write(msg + "
")
